creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Neal Nelson wrote on 26.09.2011 11:27:
>
> On 2011-09-25, at 18:33 , Ruslan Mahmatkhanov wrote:
>
>> Neal Nelson wrote on 25.09.2011 11:10:
>>> The following reply was made to PR ports/160988; it has been noted by GNATS.
>>>
>>> From: "Neal Nelson"<neal@nelson.name>
>>> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
>>> Cc:
>>> Subject: Re: ports/160988: [UPDATE] devel/py-zopeInterface: update to 3.8.0
>>> Date: Sun, 25 Sep 2011 09:03:22 +0200
>>>
>>>   Edwin Groothuis writes:
>>>
>>>   >   Maintainer of devel/py-zopeInterface,
>>>   >
>>>   >   Please note that PR ports/160988 has just been submitted.
>>>   >
>>>   >   If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>>>   >   you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>>>   >   and a committer will take care of it.
>>>   >
>>>   >   The full text of the PR can be found at:
>>>   >       http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/160988
>>>   >
>>>   >   --
>>>   >   Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
>>>   >   edwin@FreeBSD.org
>>>   >
>>>   >     >
>>>
>>>   Please go ahead with this patch.
>>>
>>>   Thanks.
>>
>> Hi, Neal.
>>
>> Don't you have objections against passing maintainership of this port?
>> Would you mind also approve repocopy of this port:
>> http://bugs.freebsd.org/160846
>>
>> Thanks.
>>
>> --
>> Regards,
>> Ruslan
>>
>
> Hi.
>
> I have no real attachment to this port, so passing maintainership to someone who will look after it properly is probably best.
>
> The renaming of the port looks OK as well. Consistency is always a nice thing.
>
> Thanks,
>
> Neal.

Ok, thanks.

Joe, would you mind to change maintainership also? Thanks.

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
